pr.title: Add dealer market intelligence metrics
pr.body: ## Summary - Adds a dealer analytics Market intelligence section. - Adds cards for Market Position, Pricing Competitiveness, Lead Conversion, Inventory Age, and Demand Trends. - Adds a Market summary section with Top Makes, Top Models, Top Locations, Revenue, and Lead Growth. - Extends the dealer analytics API listing payload with make, model, suburb and state so top lists can be calculated. - Adds a `dealer_leads` Supabase migration with the requested fields. - Adds dealer lead indexes for dealer, vehicle and status lookups plus RLS policies for dealer-owned leads. - Adds `lead_notes` with `lead_id`, `user_id`, `note`, and `created_at` fields. - Adds lead note indexes and RLS policies scoped through the parent dealer lead owner. - Includes the `dealer_leads` and `lead_notes` schemas in `RUN_IN_SUPABASE.sql`. - Adds `/dealers/crm` as a dealer CRM page using the existing dealer leads API. - Adds search, status filters, CRM lead cards, follow-up counts and assignment/insight badges. - Converts the dealer CRM into a four-column pipeline: New, Contacted, Booked, and Negotiating. - Adds sample CRM pipeline cards for John Smith/Toyota Hilux, Sarah Jones, Michael Brown, and David Lee when no live leads exist. - Adds `/dealers/crm/[leadId]` as a focused CRM lead detail route. - Makes CRM pipeline cards link to their lead detail view. - Adds CRM lead detail sections for Customer Information, Vehicle Interest, Conversation History, Notes, Tasks, and Status. - Adds sample lead notes: `Customer wants finance.`, `Returning Saturday.`, and `Interested in tow package.` - Extracts sample CRM lead data into a shared helper used by the CRM board and detail route. - Extends dealer lead statuses with `booked` and `negotiating`. - Links the dealer CRM from the dealer dashboard. ## Testing - `npx eslint src/app/dealers/analytics/page.tsx` (passes with existing analytics setState-in-effect warning) - `npx eslint src/app/api/dealers/analytics/route.ts src/app/dealers/analytics/page.tsx` (passes with existing analytics setState-in-effect warning) - `npx eslint src/app/dealers/crm/page.tsx src/app/dealers/dashboard/page.tsx` - `npx eslint src/lib/dealer-crm-sample-leads.ts src/app/dealers/crm/page.tsx 'src/app/dealers/crm/[leadId]/page.tsx'` - `npx eslint 'src/app/dealers/crm/[leadId]/page.tsx'` - `npx eslint src/lib/dealer-crm-sample-leads.ts 'src/app/dealers/crm/[leadId]/page.tsx'` - `git diff --check` - `npm run build`
pr.author: shaunsjjones1977-create
